notes: The scalar-loop SVD-UKF GPU comparator was not launched because the same scalar compiled comparator failed before timing on CPU with TensorFlow TraceType infeasibility for TFStructuralStateSpace.
Batched SVD-UKF GPU artifacts exist for B=20, B=256, and B=4096.
This is scalar comparator feasibility evidence, not a batched SVD-UKF correctness failure.
